education.description: Institute of Communication and Computer Systems (ICCS). Horizon Europe TURING project. Advisors: Konstantinos Tserpes, Theodora Varvarigou, Georgios Bouloumakis.

education.degree: MS by Research — Electronics and Communication Engineering
education.institution: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT-H)
education.description: iHub-Data Fellowship. Thesis: Camera-Based Deep Learning Framework for AQI Estimation. Supervisors: Prof. Sachin Chaudhari and Prof. Anoop M. Namboodiri. Defended November 2025.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering — Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering
education.institution: St. Vincent Pallotti College of Engineering and Technology

publications.title: Network-aware path planning for AMRs: A generalizable framework with spatial-aware adaptation
publications.description: Spatial-aware transformer framework for network quality prediction enabling train-once-deploy-everywhere AMR path planning.

publications.title: Network-Aware Path Planning for Autonomous Mobile Robots in Industrial Environments
publications.description: Communication-aware path planning framework integrating A*, CVAE, and GNN planners validated against real-world iV2I+ measurements.

publications.title: AQIFormer: A Transformer-Based Multi-View Architecture for Cross-City Air Quality Classification
publications.description: Transformer ensemble model achieving 89.96% AQI classification accuracy with strong cross-city generalization.

publications.title: TRAQID — Traffic-Related Air Quality Image Dataset
publications.description: 26,678 synchronized front-rear traffic images with co-located AQI and meteorological data spanning six AQI categories.

publications.title: Protocol for Hunting PM2.5 Emission Hot Spots in Cities
publications.description: Mobile-platform protocol for identifying PM2.5 emission hotspots using IoT devices calibrated against reference instruments.

publications.title: CV and IoT-based Remote Triggered Labs: Use Case of Conservation of Mechanical Energy
publications.description: Computer vision-based velocity estimation for remote laboratory experiments, achieving 10x MSE improvement over IR-based methods.

patents.title: System for Determining Air Quality Index (AQI) in Urban Environments
System and Method for Determining Air Quality by Processing Environmental and Traffic-Related Visual Data
System and Method for Implementing an Experiment Remotely and Determining an Output Using a Computer Vision Model

experience.company: National Technical University of Athens (NTUA) / ICCS
responsibilities: Research on efficient AI inference under Horizon Europe TURING project

Network-aware path planning for AMRs under Horizon Europe PANDORA project

Mentoring industry professionals in AI Infinity and AI/ML certification programs
Guiding participants through Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Science
Supervising capstone projects in collaboration with University of Michigan

Conducted cross-city generalization experiments across Hyderabad and Nagpur datasets
